title: oncerum rubellum
intro: Oncerum rubellum, also known as Red Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its reddish stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Oncerum rubellum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Oncerum rubellum is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
